description_long: This object resembles a large, rounded apricot with a weathered, patchy surface and several visible cracks and holes. The exterior is a muted, pale orange-brown, with irregular discolorations and a matte, rough finish. The top edge is slightly indented and uneven, suggesting natural wear or damage. The interior is hollow and dark, with more visible cracks and some missing sections, giving it a fragile appearance. The surface texture is uneven, with both smooth and rough patches, and the apricot appears to be dried or desiccated. There are no visible stems or leaves attached, and the object is isolated from any other fruits.
description: A large, weathered apricot with a pale, patchy surface, visible cracks, and a hollow, damaged interior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, cracked surface with several holes and a prominent seam.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the uneven rim and the depth of the hollow interior.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the dark, hollow inside with multiple cracks and missing sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays more surface cracks and the irregular, rough exterior.
attribute_blemish_pattern: multiple cracks, holes, and discoloration patches
